hero.description: Deploy a proprietary AI infrastructure that automates property acquisition, lead nurturing, and deal closing. While others teach, we install and operate.

comparison.subtitle: Why keep buying courses when you can install results?
old_items: They give you theory, you do the dirty work.
Complete dependence on your time and energy.
new_items: Infrastructure ready to operate in 14 days.

phases.title: 7-Phase OS Integration
phases.subtitle: From base architecture to massive scale. A surgical process of digital transformation.

done_with_you.title: You're not alone in the cockpit.
done_with_you.description: Unlike software you subscribe to and forget, or a course you never finish, we are your technology partners. We install the architecture, configure your agents, and operate by your side.

items.title: 1:1 Strategic Support
items.desc: Weekly optimization sessions to tune your growth engine.

items.title: AI Maintenance
items.desc: We update your AI models monthly so they never become obsolete.

cta_final.title: Ready for the command shift?
